series_metadata.series_description: Records of claims and litigations by and/or against an agency

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain permanently ; Paper: Retain paper 2 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed. If case is dismissed without prejudice, retain 1 year after statute of limitations runs. Scan to electronic form for permanent retention. Then review by State Archives prior to disposal., Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Trash
